evals.prompt: Compare pricing across the claude-4 family.
evals.expected_output: An array of claude-4 family models with input/output/cache prices, sorted by input_price ascending.
assertions: Response includes at least Sonnet 4 and Opus 4 variants
Each entry exposes input_price_per_mtok, output_price_per_mtok, cache_write_price_per_mtok, cache_read_price_per_mtok

evals.prompt: Compare gpt-4 and claude-4 families across openai and anthropic.
evals.expected_output: Models from both families and providers, suitable for cross-vendor comparison.
assertions: Response includes models from both providers
All models belong to either gpt-4 or claude-4 families when filtered
